scriptId: cs_v2_OVERRIDE_L40_Medium-term plans for the next year
historyId: h_v2_OVERRIDE_L40_Medium-term plans for the next year

decisions: Quarterly decision checkpoints: define triggers for pivot, required data, owner roles, decision speed, and escalation paths; formal governance cadence.
Pivot options and data requirements: Scale Up/Turbo, Reallocate, Re-scope, Pause/Stop, Delay/Stage; specify required evidence per option.

Data quality and statistical requirements before pivoting: validated data from primary sources; p ≤ 0.05 and power ≥ 80% for experiments; cohort windows (30/60/90 days) and sample sizes documented in checkpoint pack.
Reporting & governance process: pre-work KPI sheets, exec checkpoint, action ownership and timelines, board escalation if material to runway.
Operational cadence: 1-page decision log after each pivot; weekly tactical updates; quarterly pivot outcome retrospective.
entities: Owners: Head of Product; Head of Marketing; Head of Engineering; Finance rep
Pivot types: Scale Up/Turbo; Reallocate; Re-scope; Pause/Stop; Delay/Stage
Checkpoints cadence: quarterly end-of-quarter review; fast-track triggers
